name: claude-docs-mgmt
description: Session-end documentation audit + new-project doc framework. /docs-sync captures session learnings into .claude/docs + BUGS.md + TEST_CASES.md, audits for drift. /init-docs scaffolds a doc framework for a new project (4 profiles: fullstack-web, backend-only, library, mobile). Includes a PreCompact hook that blocks /compact on a dirty tree until docs are synced.
